content.full_text:
Letter from Leon E. Panetta to the Office of the Chairman, Fair Political Practices Commission

January 14, 1992

TO: Office of the Chairman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
Post Office Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804

ENCLOSURE FROM: Mr. Clarence E. Elias.

RE: Mr. Elias would like to know what requirements he must meet in order to be considered an official candidate for Governor of California. Although I have also referred his questions to the Secretary of State, I would appreciate any information your office can provide.

Would you please review the attached and reply to the concerns or questions which this constituent has brought to my attention?

Thank you for your assistance. Please reply in writing and/or with printed information.

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

LEON E. PANETTA  
Member of Congress

PLEASE RESPOND TO ME AT:
380 Alvarado Street  
Monterey, California 93940

ATTENTION: Ken Christopher; (408) 429-1976
